revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:会津比売神]]
{{Infobox deity}}

{{Infobox noble
| name = Kaizu-hime no Mikoto
| image = 
| image_size = 
| caption = 
| period = {{ill|Japanese Antiquity|ja|上古#日本|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Antiquity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Antiquity|1=Ancient history|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q41493}} / {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}
| birth_date = Unknown
| death_date = Unknown
| posthumous_name = 
| divine_title = {{ill|Kaizu-hime no Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime no Kami|1=Aizu-hime-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q56350355}}
| other_names = {{ill|Itsuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja|伊都速比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| Rank = 
| burial_place = {{ill|Tsumaonna Mountain|ja|妻女山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumaonna Mountain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumaonna Mountain|qq=}}
| court_Rank = 
| lord = Possibly {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|qid=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}}
| family = {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|qid=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}} ({{ill|Suwa-no-kimi|ja|洲羽君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa-no-kimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa-no-kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} / {{ill|Suwa-no-kokuzo|ja|洲羽国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa-no-kokuzo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa-no-kokuzo|1=Suwa-no-kokuzo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q67499361}})
| parents = Father: Possibly {{ill|Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|伊豆早雄命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja_comment=|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=出早雄命|}}
| siblings = Possibly {{ill|Masoga-o no Mikoto|ja|真曽我男命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masoga-o no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Masoga-o no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| spouse = {{ill|Takeiwanese no Mikoto|ja|武五百建命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeiwanese no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeiwanese no Mikoto|1=Take Momotake no Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q87863507}}
| children = '''{{ill|Takeinese no Mikoto|ja|健稲背命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeinese no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeinese no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}'''
}}
'''Kaizu-hime no Mikoto''' (会津比売命 / あいづひめのみこと) is a deity associated with folk traditions in {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, particularly in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}}. She is venerated as a divine figure in {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2370082}}.
== Overview ==
The {{ill|Kaizu-hime Shrine|ja|会津比売神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505718|1=Aizuhime Shrine}} venerates her as '''Kaizu-hime no Kami''' (会津比売神). 
The origin of the name "Kaizu" is unclear, though it may derive from the historical name of the surrounding {{ill|Matsushiro|ja|松代町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushiro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushiro|1=松代町|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11529236}} area, which was traditionally called "Kaizu" (海津). {{ill|Matsushiro Castle|en|Matsushiro Castle|qid=Q11104236|lt=Matsushiro Castle|1=Matsushiro Castle}} was also historically known as Kaizu Castle.
According to the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|qid=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}, she was enshrined as {{ill|Aitsuhime no Kami|ja|會津比賣神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aitsuhime no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aitsuhime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and received the Rank of {{ill|Jūshi-i|ja|従四位|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} in 866 CE.<ref>諏訪史料叢書 巻28, p. 73</ref> 
Traditions associate her as the wife of {{ill|Takeiwanese no Mikoto|ja|武五百建命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeiwanese no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeiwanese no Mikoto|1=Take Momotake no Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q87863507}}, the first {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|qid=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}} governor and probable occupant of the {{ill|Mori Shogun-zuka Kofun|ja|森将軍塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mori Shogun-zuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mori Shogun-zuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 埴科古墳群|1=Hanishina Kofun group|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6912108}}. She is sometimes identified with {{ill|Itsuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja|伊津速比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, another deity linked to {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}’s lineage.
A legend claims that her tomb lies atop {{ill|Tsumaonna Mountain|ja|妻女山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumaonna Mountain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumaonna Mountain|qq=}}, and the mountain's name is said to originate from her story.
== Genealogy ==
At {{ill|Kaizu-hime Shrine|ja|会津比売神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505718|1=Aizuhime Shrine}}, she is considered the daughter of {{ill|Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja|伊豆速雄命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a child of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}. Other sources suggest that she was the daughter of {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}} (also known as Rokuo Hiko no Kami), with siblings such as {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}} and {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}.<ref>"諏訪下社大祝武居祝系圖略," 諏訪史料叢書 巻28, 諏訪教育会, 昭和11th year , p. 73</ref>
== Shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaizu-hime Shrine|ja|会津比売神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizu-hime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505718|1=Aizuhime Shrine}} ({{ill|Matsushiro|ja|松代町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushiro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushiro|1=松代町|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11529236}}, {{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano City|1=Nagano (city)}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}})
== References ==

* {{ill|Tsumaonna Mountain|ja|妻女山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumaonna Mountain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumaonna Mountain|qq=}}
* {{ill|Takeiwanese no Mikoto|ja|武五百建命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeiwanese no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeiwanese no Mikoto|1=Take Momotake no Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q87863507}}
* {{ill|List of ancient Japanese figures|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of ancient Japanese figures|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of ancient Japanese figures|1=list of ancient Japanese figures|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11665973}}
{{Suwa Faith|qq=}}
